_provenance: Vendored cold-start seed for Blindfold, transcribed from voice-diary's curated data (server/webapp/seed.sql) per ADR-0012 (data reuse as a cold-start seed; concept reuse, NOT runtime coupling). This is a standalone artifact in THIS repo with no build/runtime dependency on the voice-diary repo. persons (+variations) and terms (+variations) are voice-diary's curated entities verbatim; org_units / entity_relationships / role_assignments are derived from the persons' company/department/role columns (voice-diary did not curate org_unit rows). Real values are plaintext THIS slice; Transit encryption + blind index land in #10 (ADR-0008).
_curation: Per ADR-0013 (seed only sensitive referents): `terms` holds ONLY sensitive referents (blindfold targets); non-sensitive context tokens are either org_units (structure, never blindfolded) or absent from the seed. Curated by hand from voice-diary's ASR-era `terms` (whose `category` column was an ASR signal, NOT a privacy signal). Decisions: KEEP as term -> Enervia, Voltwerk; PROMOTE to term -> Magic Square (internal codename, voice-diary category 'department'). DEMOTE to org_unit-only (already an org_unit with a member) -> Engineering (its bilingual variations Softwareentwicklung/Technikabteilung were dropped: an un-blindfolded token needs no coreference). DROP entirely (generic/public, no structure) -> Kubernetes (+K8s/k8s), BYOD Policy (+BYOD/Bring Your Own Device), Internal Business Services, Cloud Services, Payment Systems (the last three were voice-diary category 'department' but carry no members/edges, so no org_unit row this slice). Unifying terms/org_units under one entity + a `sensitive` flag is deferred to v2: ADR-0014 / issue #22.
